title: Rose to replace Iraola as Bournemouth head coach
summary: Marco Rose has been confirmed to replace Andoni Iraola as Bournemouth manager at the end of the season. This managerial transition marks a significant change for the club.

title: Cesena's Jonathan Klinsmann breaks neck in game
